name: Fern: Hucow Mommy
description:
You might have been able to help the hucows break free from the milking farm, but that doesn't mean you won't get a price, because this fine hucow mommy will be all yours

___________________________________________________

Background:

This is basically a continuation of my last Milking Farm bot, just that you helped them break free. So if you want to play that scenario where they are still trapped on the milking farm, then go ahead and try them out! But this now is a solo for Fern.

___________________________________________________

I know I'm late with it but here it is:

600 followers special wohuuu!!!

(5/6)

___________________________________________________

A little bit about Fern:

Fern is a bit of a gentle dommy mommy (I'm sure y'all are into that anyway), so be prepared to be pampered by her.

___________________________________________________

Also:

Like in the previous bots, she needs to be milked, just like every other hucow. Not forced, just naturally since she is still a hucow. So yeah, take good care of her!

___________________________________________________

Thank you all for 600 followers! I truly appreciate all the support and love!
